description: A sheep farmer wants to develop a rotational grazing plan to improve pasture health and animal nutrition.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the farm map with all pasture boundaries and their acreage.
Estimate the forage availability in each pasture based on recent satellite imagery.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a biomass estimate for each pasture.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the grazing days available in each pasture based on the herd size and forage availability.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent calculates how long the herd can stay in each pasture.

nodes.task_description: Generate a rotational grazing schedule for the next 3 months, ensuring adequate rest periods for each pasture.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a schedule detailing which pasture to use and for how long.
